formula: ifElse(and3(not(isNull(MINIMUM_ANNUAL_REVENUE_PEC)), not(isNull(MAXIMUM_ANNUAL_REVENUE_PEC)), not(isNull(ANNUAL_REVENUE_CM))), and(ge(ANNUAL_REVENUE_CM, resultFromFormulaEvalStep2), le(ANNUAL_REVENUE_CM, resultFromFormulaEvalStep3)), 0)
ifElse(and3(not(isNull(MINIMUM_TENURE_PEC)), not(isNull(MAXIMUM_TENURE_PEC)),  not(isNull(TENURE_CM))), and(ge(TENURE_CM, resultFromFormulaEvalStep2), le(TENURE_CM, resultFromFormulaEvalStep3)), 0)

ifElse(and3(not(isNull(MINIMUM_DEAL_AMOUNT_PEC)), not(isNull(MAXIMUM_DEAL_AMOUNT_PEC)), not(isNull(MAX_DEAL_AMOUNT_CM))), and(ge(MAX_DEAL_AMOUNT_CM, resultFromFormulaEvalStep2), le(MAX_DEAL_AMOUNT_CM, resultFromFormulaEvalStep3)), 0)
round((EXISTING_DEBT_CM / ifElse(eq(STAGE_OF_EQUITY_CM, 'SHA signed'), NET_WORTH_CM + IMMINENT_EQUITY_RAISED_CM, NET_WORTH_CM)), 2)
ifElse(or(isNull(BALANCE_SHEET_CM), or(isNull(NET_WORTH_CM), or(isNull(INTANGIBLE_ASSETS_CM), isNull(TOL_PEC)))), 0, le(resultFromFormulaEval, TOL_PEC))
